title: TabularisDB/tabularis
abstract: Open-source desktop SQL workspace for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, SQLite and 12+ databases. Built-in SQL notebook, AI assistance, and MCP support for AI agents.
abstract_zh: TabularisDB，你的数据小助手！一个开源的桌面SQL工作站，支持PostgreSQL、MySQL/MariaDB、SQLite等12+数据库。内置SQL笔记本，AI帮你写代码，还有MCP认证的AI代理来助你一臂之力。再也不怕数据乱炖了，让我们一起玩转表格吧！
